docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIRAITTEWANNA, RATANA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR OFFICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-20-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR OFFICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: RATANA JIRAITTEWANNA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR OFFICE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.02 FILED BY JIRAITTEWANNA, RATANA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MAYOR OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
